exceptions.reason: Transitional event-replay repair commands still compose legacy ingestion job services until replay and repair ports are extracted.
Transitional consumer-DLQ replay commands still compose legacy ingestion job services until replay ports are extracted.
Transitional ingestion-operations queries still compose legacy ingestion job services until query reader ports are extracted.
Transitional retry commands still use legacy ingestion service and DTO contracts until DTO-to-command mapping and retry ports are completed.
Transitional ops-control commands still compose legacy ingestion job services until ops-control ports are extracted.
Replay payload dispatch still validates legacy ingestion DTO payloads for API compatibility until anti-corruption payload commands are introduced.
Workflow policies temporarily use legacy lifecycle result types until ingestion lifecycle contracts move fully into application/domain packages.
Workflow store ports temporarily reference legacy DTO and lifecycle result types until internal application result contracts replace them.
Upload publisher port still accepts validated Pydantic records while upload DTO-to-command migration remains transitional.
Reconciliation repository ports still expose selected persistence row types until typed adapter records replace them.
